content: User request: My flight from Tokyo to Sydney has been delayed. Can I find out the compensation rules?
Agent called NO tools — responded with text only.

Verifier: FAILED — avg=0.00 std=0.00 | The agent did not provide any information about compensation rules. Instead, they asked for a booking reference or flight ID, which is not required to provide general information on compensation rules for delayed flights on that route. (score=0.0)
